results.title: Best Bike Routes in San Francisco: Scenic Paths & Landmarks
results.content: golden gate bridge biking trail. # Scenic Bike Routes of San Francisco. ## A Cyclist’s Guide to San Francisco’s Best Bike Routes. It’s time to feel the wind whistling through your hair (through the holes in your helmet!) on a scenic San Francisco bike route. San Francisco is an incredibly unique biking city with much to offer within (and beyond) the city limits. cyclists riding a trail in SF. * **Bike-Friendly:** San Francisco boasts an extensive network of bike lanes, protected paths, bike-sharing programs, and simple bike rentals, making it super easy to obtain a bike and use it throughout the city and beyond. If you want to head out on a self-guided experience, we have lots of options for great San Francisco bike routes. Is San Francisco a bike-friendly city?**. The Golden Gate Bridge has a dedicated bike path, allowing cyclists to enjoy stunning views of the city, the bay, Alcatraz, and more.
